jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Frontend Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
